summary: Phase 1 Final Integration verified — branding + health checks + navigation. Backend: /api/system/health returns mode=mock, store.ok=true, bridge=null; /api/ returns {service, status:ok}; /api/kpis returns 8 accounts; /api/accounts returns 8 items; equity/trades endpoints OK (5/5 pytest cases in test_phase1_branding.py). Frontend: dashboard loads with data-testid='dashboard', header shows Sr. Atlas logo + text, nav-about and nav-docs both navigate correctly, About page shows forge logo + Brand Hierarchy (Forge Factory Lab + Sr. Atlas cards), Documentation page shows docs-forge-logo and all four sections (Architecture, Health Monitoring Workflow, Installation, Roadmap), REFRESH FEED button clickable without errors, tab title = 'Sr. Atlas · Forge Factory Lab', favicon set. BrandBoot splash (data-testid='brand-boot') appears on fresh session load and self-dismisses to reveal the dashboard within ~2s. ?noboot=1 bypass works for deterministic testing.
critical_code_review_comments: PageShell (secondary pages) uses data-testid='pagenav-{label}' while Dashboard uses 'nav-about' / 'nav-docs'. Inconsistent naming may confuse future automation — consider unifying testids across headers.

Docs page section headings are uppercased via CSS text-transform; underlying text is title-cased. Automation scripts must be case-insensitive or match the DOM text (title-case) rather than the visual uppercase.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 branding integration is stable. Backend still in mock mode (MT5_BRIDGE_URL unset), all endpoints healthy. Frontend routes: / (Dashboard, data-testid='dashboard'), /about (data-testid='about-page' + 'about-forge-logo'), /docs (data-testid='documentation-page' + 'docs-forge-logo'). BrandBoot splash shows once per session; add ?noboot=1 to bypass. Dashboard nav uses testids 'nav-about'/'nav-docs'/'refresh-button'; secondary pages (About/Docs) use 'pagenav-terminal/about/documentation'. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_branding.py -v` for smoke.
